110 SMITHFIELD ST · PITTSBURGH PA

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions answered.

Where are you located?
We're at 110 Smithfield Street in Downtown Pittsburgh — one block from Market Square. The easiest landmark is the First Avenue T station, which puts you right at our door.
What are your hours?
We're open Tuesday through Friday for lunch (11:30–14:30) and dinner (16:30–21:00), Saturday from 11:30–21:00, and Sunday from 11:30–20:00. We're closed on Mondays.
Do I need a reservation?
Walk-ins are always welcome, but reservations are recommended — especially on weekends and Friday evenings. You can book online or call us at 412-600-1000. For parties of 6 or more, please call ahead so we can set the long table.
Do you offer takeout?
Yes — you can order online through Toast or call us directly. Everything on our menu is available for takeout, including sushi and soups.
How close are you to Market Square?
One block. We're on Smithfield Street — if you're standing in Market Square facing Fifth Avenue, walk toward the T station and you'll see us.
Is it Korean food, Japanese food, or both?
Both. We've been serving Korean home cooking — bibimbap, bulgogi, galbi, jjigae — since 1990, and our sushi bar has been part of the menu for decades. Most people come for one and stay for the other.
Is there parking nearby?
There's metered street parking on Smithfield Street and several garages within a short walk — including the First Avenue Garage and the Fort Pitt Garage. The T (First Avenue station) is the easiest option if you're coming from the North Shore or the suburbs.
스시 김 2
Sushi Kim 2

A 30+ year Pittsburgh institution serving soulful Korean cooking and premium Japanese sushi in the heart of downtown.
